## Verification

## Contribution checks

- [ ] I kept the change focused and documented public CLI, schema, or artifact changes.
- [ ] I added or updated deterministic tests for observable behavior.
- [ ] I did not commit generated build output, run artifacts, credentials, or sensitive target logs.
- [ ] Any corpus fixture is minimal, source-linked, reproducible against exact targets, and license-compatible.
- [ ] This pull request does not publicly disclose an uncoordinated security vulnerability.
